title: Text Message Welcome Series AI Content Generation
summary: Testing AI-generated copy vs. static default text in the SMS welcome flow workflow to reduce setup friction and increase flow activation rate.
hypothesis:
We believe that automating the addition and configuration of the text message action in an account's existing abandoned checkout email flow for companies that have at least 1 existing abandoned checkout email that has recovered at least $1500 in revenue over the last quarter will lead to increased SMS sending because of the reduced friction from automatically selecting and placing the text message action in a best practice position.

We will measure success using New 7D and New 28D SMS Sends, and monitor New 7D and 28D SMS Flows to ensure no negative impact.
notes: Released today to 50% of eligible accounts. PRD: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HGjObboTIYqgD78JZ34IWIV4ySsQlon5XLxNsOuOnBA/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.pw5n5ufxkivs
control_description: Text Message Welcome Series workflow with static default copy
treatment_description: Text Message Welcome Series workflow with AI-generated customized and purpose-built message content

treatments.label: Treatment
treatments.description: Text Message Welcome Series workflow with AI-generated customized and purpose-built message content
